response:
# PRODUCT REQUIREMENT DOCUMENT - SPECIFICATION SECTION
## Annual Statement View and Download for HDFC PIXEL Studio

---

## 5. CURRENT STATE SUMMARY

Today, PIXEL credit card users can access only the last 24 months of monthly statements within the app. For annual or consolidated statements spanning a financial year, customers must contact customer support teams who manually retrieve archived statements and email them to the registered email ID. This creates operational overhead, increases support ticket volume during tax season (March-April), and delays self-employed users who need comprehensive annual statements for CA filing and ITR preparation. No self-service annual statement generation exists currently.

---

## 6. SCOPE

### IN SCOPE:
- Annual statement generation for up to 3 completed financial years (FY)
- Asynchronous PDF generation with 30-minute SLA
- In-app view and download of generated annual statements
- Request initiation flow from statements section
- Annual statement content: transaction summary, rewards summary, EMI details, add-on card transactions, credit limit changes, payment history
- Password-protected PDF for email delivery
- Non-password-protected PDF for in-app access
- Request status tracking and notifications
- Customer support agent ability to trigger annual statement generation
- Retry mechanism for failed generation requests
- Financial year selection (April to March for Indian FY)

### OUT OF SCOPE:
- Real-time/synchronous statement generation — Server load constraints require asynchronous processing for annual statements
- Annual statements for incomplete/current financial year — Only completed FYs to ensure data completeness and accuracy
- Statements older than 3 financial years — Regulatory retention requirements and storage optimization
- Customizable date range statements — Complexity and server load; annual FY statements address primary use case
- Bulk download of multiple years in single PDF — File size and generation time constraints
- Statement generation for closed/inactive accounts — Focus on active cardholders with operational accounts
- Integration with third-party tax filing software — Requires partnerships and API development beyond current scope
- Printed/physical annual statement delivery — Digital-only product maintains e-statement model

---

## 9. FUNCTIONAL USE CASES

### Use Case 1: Self-employed user requests annual statement for completed FY
**Actor:** Primary cardholder (self-employed user)

**Precondition:** 
- User has active PIXEL credit card
- User is authenticated in PIXEL app
- At least one complete financial year of card usage exists
- No pending annual statement request for same FY in last 30 minutes

**User Story:** As a self-employed credit card user, I want to request and download my annual financial year statement so that I can share it with my CA for ITR filing without contacting customer support.

**Steps:**
1. User navigates to Statements section from home screen
2. User taps on "Annual Statements" tab/option
3. System displays list of available financial years (up to 3 completed FYs)
4. User selects desired financial year (e.g., FY 2023-24)
5. System displays statement summary preview: total transactions, total spend, rewards earned, EMI summary
6. User taps "Generate Annual Statement" button
7. System validates request and initiates asynchronous generation
8. System displays confirmation screen with estimated time (30 minutes)
9. User receives in-app notification when statement is ready
10. User returns to Annual Statements section
11. User views generated statement status as "Ready"
12. User taps "View" or "Download" button
13. System displays/downloads PDF statement

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Given user has completed FY 2023-24 with transactions, when user navigates to Annual Statements, then system displays "FY 2023-24 (Apr 2023 - Mar 2024)" as available option
- Given user selects FY 2023-24, when user taps Generate, then system displays confirmation "Your annual statement is being generated. You'll be notified within 30 minutes" with request ID
- Given statement generation is initiated, when user navigates away and returns, then system displays status as "In Progress" with timestamp and estimated completion time
- Given statement is successfully generated, when user receives notification, then notification text reads "Your FY 2023-24 annual statement is ready to view" with deep link to statements section
- Given statement is ready, when user taps View, then PDF opens in in-app viewer without password protection
- Given statement is ready, when user taps Download, then PDF downloads to device with filename format "PIXEL_Annual_Statement_FY2023-24_[CardLast4Digits].pdf"
- Given user has already requested same FY statement in last 30 minutes, when user attempts to generate again, then system displays existing request status instead of creating duplicate
- Given annual statement PDF is generated, when user views content, then statement includes: cardholder name, card number (masked), FY period, transaction summary by month, category-wise spend breakdown, rewards earned and redeemed, EMI summary, add-on card transactions (if applicable), credit limit changes, payment history, total spend, and HDFC Bank branding

**Failure State AC:**
- Given statement generation fails due to server error, when 30 minutes elapse, then user receives notification "We couldn't generate your statement. Please try again" with retry button
- Given user has no transactions in selected FY, when user attempts to generate, then system displays message "No transactions found for FY 2023-24. Annual statement cannot be generated"
- Given system is under heavy load, when user initiates request, then system displays "High demand detected. Your statement may take up to 45 minutes" and adjusts SLA
- Given user's account is temporarily locked, when user attempts to generate statement, then system displays "Statement generation unavailable. Please contact support" with support contact option

**Priority:** P0

---

### Use Case 2: User checks status of pending annual statement request
**Actor:** Primary cardholder

**Precondition:**
- User has initiated annual statement generation request
- Request is in "In Progress" state
- User is authenticated in PIXEL app

**User Story:** As a credit card user, I want to check the status of my annual statement request so that I know when it will be available for download.

**Steps:**
1. User navigates to Statements section
2. User taps on "Annual Statements" tab
3. System displays list of FYs with status indicators
4. User views FY with "In Progress" status badge
5. User taps on in-progress FY row
6. System displays request details: request time, estimated completion, current status
7. User optionally taps "Notify me when ready" toggle

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Given statement request was initiated 10 minutes ago, when user views Annual Statements, then system displays "In Progress" badge with progress indicator and "Estimated completion: 20 minutes"
- Given statement request was initiated 35 minutes ago and failed, when user views status, then system displays "Failed" status with "Retry" button and error message "Generation failed due to technical issue"
- Given multiple FY statements exist, when user views list, then system displays status for each: "Ready", "In Progress", "Failed", or "Not Generated"
- Given user enables "Notify me when ready", when statement completes, then user receives both push notification and in-app notification
- Given statement generation exceeds 30-minute SLA, when user checks status at 35 minutes, then system displays "Taking longer than expected. We'll notify you once ready" message

**Failure State AC:**
- Given network connectivity is lost, when user attempts to check status, then system displays cached status with timestamp and "Last updated: [time]" indicator
- Given request ID is invalid/corrupted, when system attempts to fetch status, then system displays "Unable to fetch status. Please try generating again" with support contact option

**Priority:** P0

---

### Use Case 3: User downloads and shares annual statement with CA via email
**Actor:** Primary cardholder (self-employed user)

**Precondition:**
- Annual statement for selected FY is in "Ready" state
- User is authenticated in PIXEL app
- Device has email client configured or sharing capability

**User Story:** As a self-employed user, I want to download and share my annual statement directly from the app so that I can quickly send it to my CA for tax filing.

**Steps:**
1. User navigates to Annual Statements section
2. User views FY 2023-24 with "Ready" status
3. User taps "Share" button/icon
4. System displays share options: Email, WhatsApp, Other apps
5. User selects Email
6. System opens email composer with PDF attached
7. User enters CA's email address
8. User adds optional message
9. User sends email
10. System logs share event

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Given statement is ready, when user taps Share button, then system displays native share sheet with PDF file attached
- Given user selects email option, when email composer opens, then email subject line reads "PIXEL Annual Statement - FY 2023-24" and PDF is attached with filename "PIXEL_Annual_Statement_FY2023-24_[CardLast4Digits].pdf"
- Given PDF is shared via email, when recipient receives email, then PDF is password-protected with password format: Date of Birth (DDMMYYYY) as per registered records
- Given user downloads PDF to device, when file is saved, then PDF is non-password-protected for in-app access but password-protected version is created for external sharing
- Given user shares statement, when share action completes, then system logs event with timestamp, FY, and share method for analytics
- Given PDF file size exceeds email attachment limit (25MB), when user attempts email share, then system displays "File too large for email. Try WhatsApp or download to cloud storage" with alternative options

**Failure State AC:**
- Given device has no email client configured, when user selects email option, then system displays "No email app found. Please download PDF and share manually" with download button
- Given share action fails, when error occurs, then system displays "Share failed. Please try again or download PDF" with retry and download options
- Given PDF generation is corrupted, when user attempts to share, then system displays "Statement file is corrupted. Please regenerate" with regenerate button

**Priority:** P0

---

### Use Case 4: Customer support agent generates annual statement on behalf of user
**Actor:** Customer support agent (HDFC CS team / Zeta CS team)

**Precondition:**
- Agent is authenticated in support center/ops center
- Agent has user's account details and verification completed
- User has requested annual statement via support ticket/call
- User has at least one completed financial year of card usage

**User Story:** As a customer support agent, I want to generate and email annual statements to verified users so that I can resolve support tickets efficiently during tax season.

**Steps:**
1. Agent receives support ticket requesting annual statement for FY 2023-24
2. Agent logs into support center
3. Agent searches for user account using card number/mobile/email
4. Agent verifies user identity using standard verification questions
5. Agent navigates to Statements section in user's account view
6. Agent selects "Generate Annual Statement" option
7. Agent selects financial year (FY 2023-24)
8. System displays statement generation options: "Send to registered email" or "Generate for agent download"
9. Agent selects "Send to registered email"
10. System initiates asynchronous generation
11. System displays confirmation with request ID and estimated time
12. Agent updates support ticket with request ID and expected delivery time
13. System sends statement to user's registered email within 30 minutes
14. Agent receives notification when statement is sent
15. Agent closes support ticket with resolution notes

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Given agent has verified user identity, when agent initiates annual statement generation, then system creates request with agent ID, user ID, timestamp, and FY in audit log
- Given agent selects "Send to registered email", when statement is generated, then system sends password-protected PDF to user's registered email with subject "Your PIXEL Annual Statement - FY 2023-24" and email body includes password hint "Your date of birth (DDMMYYYY)"
- Given agent selects "Generate for agent download", when statement is ready, then agent can download password-protected PDF from support center with same password format
- Given multiple agents are handling same user, when one agent initiates request, then other agents see "Request in progress by Agent [ID]" to prevent duplicate requests
- Given statement generation fails, when error occurs, then agent receives notification with error details and troubleshooting steps
- Given agent generates statement, when action is logged, then audit trail captures: agent ID, user account, FY requested, timestamp, delivery method, and ticket ID

**Failure State AC:**
- Given user's registered email is invalid/bounced previously, when agent attempts to send statement, then system displays warning "Email delivery may fail. Registered email: [email]. Verify with user" with option to update email before sending
- Given system is under heavy load, when agent initiates request, then system displays "High volume detected. Statement will be delivered within 45 minutes" and agent can communicate extended timeline to user
- Given user account is flagged/suspended, when agent attempts to generate statement, then system blocks request and displays "Account suspended. Statement generation not allowed. Escalate to ops team"

**Priority:** P0

---

### Use Case 5: System handles failed annual statement generation and retry
**Actor:** System (background job processor)

**Precondition:**
- Annual statement generation request exists in queue
- Initial generation attempt has failed
- Failure is due to transient error (timeout, temporary server unavailability)

**User Story:** As the PIXEL system, I want to automatically retry failed annual statement generation so that users receive their statements without manual intervention.

**Steps:**
1. System initiates annual statement generation for user request
2. Generation process fails due to database timeout
3. System logs error with error code and timestamp
4. System checks failure type: transient vs permanent
5. System determines failure is transient (timeout)
6. System schedules retry attempt after 5-minute delay
7. System attempts generation again
8. Generation succeeds on retry
9. System marks request as "Completed"
10. System sends notification to user
11. System logs successful retry in audit trail

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Given statement generation fails with transient error, when system detects failure, then system automatically schedules retry after 5 minutes without user intervention
- Given first retry fails, when system detects second failure, then system schedules second retry after 10 minutes (exponential backoff)
- Given second retry fails, when system detects third failure, then system schedules third retry after 20 minutes
- Given three retry attempts fail, when system exhausts retries, then system marks request as "Failed" and sends notification to user with "Retry" button
- Given generation fails with permanent error (data corruption, missing data), when system detects non-retryable error, then system immediately marks as "Failed" without retry attempts and logs error for ops team investigation
- Given retry succeeds, when statement is generated, then system sends notification to user within 2 minutes of completion
- Given multiple requests are in retry queue, when system processes retries, then system prioritizes older requests first (FIFO)

**Failure State AC:**
- Given all retry attempts fail, when system marks request as permanently failed, then system creates ops ticket for manual investigation with error logs and user details
- Given system detects data inconsistency during generation, when error occurs, then system halts generation, logs detailed error, and notifies ops team without sending failure notification to user until investigation
- Given retry queue exceeds capacity threshold (1000 requests), when new failure occurs, then system alerts ops team and temporarily pauses new annual statement requests with user-facing message "Service temporarily unavailable"

**Priority:** P0

---

### Use Case 6: User views annual statement content with comprehensive FY summary
**Actor:** Primary cardholder

**Precondition:**
- Annual statement for selected FY is generated and in "Ready" state
- User is authenticated in PIXEL app
- User has tapped "View" button for specific FY statement

**User Story:** As a credit card user, I want to view a comprehensive annual statement with all transaction details, rewards, and EMI information so that I have complete financial records for tax filing and personal finance tracking.

**Steps:**
1. User taps "View" on FY 2023-24 annual statement
2. System opens PDF viewer in-app
3. User views statement header: HDFC PIXEL branding, cardholder name, card number (masked), FY period
4. User scrolls to view account summary section: total spend, total transactions, average monthly spend, credit limit changes
5. User views month-by-month transaction summary table
6. User views category-wise spend breakdown with charts
7. User views rewards section: total earned, total redeemed, balance, expiry details
8. User views EMI section: active EMIs, completed EMIs, total interest paid
9. User views add-on card transactions (if applicable)
10. User views payment history: total payments made, payment dates, payment methods
11. User views detailed transaction list with date, merchant, amount, category, rewards
12. User zooms in/out for readability
13. User optionally downloads PDF
